message:
fix: malformed test names and obsolete SQLite-backend doctor tests (bd-gwm8z, bd-yqpwy)

- Capitalize test function names in history_test.go (Go 1.24+ enforcement):
  TestgetIssueHistory → TestGetIssueHistory, etc. (5 functions)
- Remove TestE2E_DoctorSQLiteBackend, TestE2E_DoctorDoltBackendNoDB,
  TestRunDoltHealthChecks_NonDoltBackend: these tested SQLite backend
  behavior that no longer exists (GetBackend() always returns "dolt")
- Fix TestServerMode_NoLockAcquired: use non-listening port (59999) to
  prevent accidental connection to a real Dolt server on the machine

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
